review_body_text: I enjoyed the most during work-collaboration with other departments; as this would be the great platform to sharpen my communication skills, knowledge enhancement, grow in self-contidence & maturity and develop good teamwork
pros_text: Great place to work, persomal & career growth, & good perks
cons_text: Frequent re-org/rorg restructuring due to change to the top management

review_body_text: During my internship at Bank Rakyat, I had the opportunity to gain practical experience in one of Malaysia's leading cooperative banks. I was involved in various aspects of banking operations, such as customer service, handling financial products, and administrative support. This experience allowed me to enhance my communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills while learning from experienced professionals. It provided me with valuable insights into the cooperative banking sector and contributed significantly to my personal and professional development.

During my internship at Bank Rakyat, I had the opportunity to gain practical experience in one of Malaysia's leading cooperative banks. I was involved in various aspects of banking operations, such as customer service, handling financial products, and administrative support. This experience allowed me to enhance my communication, teamwork, and problem-solving skills while learning from experienced professionals. It provided me with valuable insights into the cooperative banking sector and contributed significantly to my personal and professional development.

review_title: HR and HQ is OK but CURRENT Manager is TOXIC
review_body_text: . typical day at work is ok . but current manager is toxic . I learn that my current manager only know how to talk . HR and HQ is ok but current manager is toxic . workplace culture not ok because senior behave like intern . the hardest part of the job is current manager is toxic . the most enjoyable part of the job is big bonus and medical expenses fully cover
Too much politics issue between bosses which is affected the staff. Benefit overall ok. You have to be “pandai bodek” bos for better career enhancement.

great place to start out my career. my supervisor has been very helpful in teaching me the basics of the job to start of in the industry. Helpful colleagues as well and are willing to teach new joiners. office is great and also get to wear casual wear to the office
fun environment, less toxic, but not all workplace is perfect, so a little imperfections is acceptable. Staff benefits is very very good in this company. Very recommended to work.

Working at Bank Rakyat as a contract executive for two years was a valuable and enriching experience. Despite the occasional stress, the knowledge gained in the field of financing was immense. The supportive and friendly nature of my colleagues significantly contributed to making the overall work environment positive. One notable aspect of the job was the yearly bonuses, which were exceptionally good. This not only served as a motivating factor but also reflected the organization's commitment to recognizing and rewarding the hard work of its employees. The acceptable overtime policy allowed for a healthy work-life balance, and the collaborative atmosphere within the bank made the workload more manageable. One of the highlights of my time at Bank Rakyat was the willingness of my colleagues to share their knowledge and expertise. The culture encouraged learning from one another, fostering a sense of teamwork and camaraderie. This collaborative approach helped me to navigate the complexities of the job more effectively and ensured a smoother integration into the organizational dynamics. Overall, my experience at Bank Rakyat was not only professionally rewarding but also personally fulfilling. The combination of a supportive work environment, generous bonuses, and the opportunity to learn from experienced colleagues made it a positive chapter in my career.
cons_text: The system used by everyone is new and nowhere near perfect.

review_body_text: A lot of bonus even for low ranked staff. The bonus will be pro rated for the first year. Supportive colleagues. The system is a little bit old. Office politics are normal.
Everything is okay. Allowance given to interns is satisfactory, however, the work culture is so toxic. People will talk behind your back and it feels like everyone hates eachother.

definitely fun experience. my supervisor was really helpful and patient with me. but i do not quite favour the late allowance payment as commuting daily to work requires money too and for food, so we do really need the money as much as the employees
overall is okay. extra hours working almost everyday and workload. no proper work process strategy. Depend on the branch manager. quite packed schedule in a day
good environment to learn for fresh graduates. work process is a bit slow have to stay for extra hours almost everyday need to improve work flow and process

Fun and productive healthy culture. Its depends on the the department you are in but usually they take turn if need to stay back to finish some work. Very friendly, very loving ang supportive eventhough dealing with customer can be very stressfull but the company is so much fun.. Learning alot with my boss
But no clear career path for sales scheme. Always hire new people without considering career advancement for existing staff. Overall it is a very pleasant feeling working at bank rakyat

The workers are friendly but the job scope for an intern is not clearly stated before starting. In my experience, the supervisor will randomly ask to assist the staff in one or two departments they need help with.
pros_text: Have allowance for intern, friendly colleagues

review_body_text: so far so good, So enjoyable work with a nice senior staff . Im still under contract for 1 years. n this was for a first month work at BR branch. hopefully can be a permanent staff after the contract end

I’am currently serving as a contract clerk in one of the Regional Collection Centre Branches. Yes, the work enviorment is very relaxed becuse 85% of the employees in the office are family people and senior citizens whom have serviced not less than 5 years with the bank. Communication among staffs and management are good but somehow there will be always 1-2 senior staffs whom disagrees everything the boss does or said (very strong in employee rights/unions stuff). Other than that, since its a 100% Malay culture, laziness is there but the act of good in properous meal ‘belanja’ always being done weekly by any of the kind-hearted staffs other than staffs are helpfull among each other. Salary wise for a diploma range contract staff is kind off sad for its figure but atleast the annual bonuses, ex-gratia payouts and claims are elidgable (as per permanent staffs) for service not less than 6 months on the day of the bonus announcement date via email. Even so, in day 2 of reporting, one of the staff recommended me to apply Staff Credit Card (I never had any credit card before) and guess what? They approved for a handsome limit of the card compared to my salary 😂. In conclusion, working with Bank Rakyat is fun and nice place to work just like any other conpanies but the con’s is always there and it depends on how you deal with it professionally.
pros_text: Free lunches (belanja by bosses and senior staffs on a monthly basis), Good staff credit card apporoval limits, Unlimited claims (as long your pengurus cawangan acknowledges it), Staff hotel benefit rates for holidays, Annual Bonuses, Ex-Gratia Payouts, Claimable Medical Bills (certain minor cases), Very religious islamic Staffs and Helpfull staffs
cons_text: Certain staffs are lazy, Kaki kipas staffs, Low salary start up for contracted staffs

review_body_text: good culture..mostly staff will helpneach other to achieve branch target. good team work. good team leader. good product. good working environment. good staff benefit.
culture in workplace is enjoyed and peaceful no stressful an very relax.Hope can get the job in shariah department and can get along with member in my old department again

Trying to sales all product from bank rakyat especially financing loan and housing loan from bank rakyat. I'm also helping for those people have a financing problem and trying to solve their money problem with reschedule their financing. I'm also had a target to achieve every month with certain product from bank rakyat.
The working environment is a good place or start up for fresh graduates that looking for first working experiences, relax working environment and reasonable wages for fresh graduates.
The culture of this company is great and conducive to work also everyone is very helpful in solving my tasks and gaining knowledge even I am not from the department.
- Good experience in bank industry. - Learn how to be professional. - Good management and team. - Strategic place in Bangi. - Enjoy with people and customer.

Good guidance from colleagues and learned many new thing also polish my ability to work under pressure. Workplace was great and I am able to be on department rotation which helped me expose to several new things.
Good environtment,nice place,strategic place near mrt.easy to find place for lunch, nice co worker.dress code is easy. Training provided.easy parking.
pros_text: Comfortable and strategic place near mrt

review_body_text: Individual with a good reputation looking to work at your company , bringing strong ability to ashere to rules and regulations guiding the company, and also obey legal laws un the process of working for the company
pros_text: More activies on weekend like family day

review_body_text: Provide a good happy peaceful work place . All staff are always help each other and have a good communication with others. Provide foodcourt for staff.
Have a nice memory with bank rakyat. A very good environment. Easy to coorperate with staff. Very supportive employer. Willing to help when needed. I'm happy working in bank rakyat.

review_title: Im enjoy work at bank rakyat but im contract for 2 years
review_body_text: Im manage for customer stamping after loan. Im also secetery my Boss and admin to all staff. Last part my job is customer service and answer call customer.

Work in a calm and harmonious atmosphere. Comfortable office space and various amenities are available.Sport club facilities and various activities are organized. Medical benefits for employees and family member
As a practical student, i need to expose myself in every department in the bank. Thus, it helped me a lot to gain knowledge and experiences. The management there were very good.

Colleague are really helpful. Willing to teach me when I don't understand anything. I learned a lot from them.Hence, I am familiar with banking sector. My communication skills got better as I always communicate with customer.

review_title: Productive work place with faster disburse loan
review_body_text: The work surrounding is good, I mean the employees, the employer and the computer system is good. I have learnt how to attend customers when they want make a loan, how to prepare all loan's document, how to attract customer to make loan with bank rakyat, how to calculate how much loan that customers want, how to key in in the system and how to blast sms about loan to customers. The hardest job is when customers argue the rate of personal loan or other loan, because they will compare to other bank and then they do not want to make it loan and they will go other bank. We can not make something because we only can pursue and slowly talk about advantage of bank rakyat for example, bank rakyat can approve personal loan in one day and customers will get the money by that day. The quality of process is very effective that we can use as our strong argue when customers want to switch at other bank. Several bank make their loan in 2 weeks. Only bank rakyat can make within 3 hours or one day by typical.
pros_text: Boss treat all staff lunch every week on friday
cons_text: There are several people there are lazy to work

review_title: work culture at my previous company
review_body_text: I learn a lot about the real work culture which is in my previous company that i work they teach me how to attend customer,how to calculate the eligibility the customer to make personal loan,how to build a good relationship ,how to achieve sales target,how to market the product.

As an internship student, the staffs being very helpful in teaching me knowledge and skills in doing the task given. I was assigned to three units at the branch and learned all the skills and experience there really helped me in viewing my future in this field.

review_title: Knowing how the bank operates it
review_body_text: the culture at work are great. the most enjoyable job at Bank raykat is knowing how the employee attend the customer. There's no have a typical day at work. The management at work is good
enjoy work with the culture and management. flexible time and many program to join and get new experience and learn the something new knowledge. tolerance and good cooperation.

processing the personal loan, attend customer and inform customer if loan has been approve . Few terms and condition should be fulfill by customer themselves before the loan can be approve. helpful colleague and happy working environment

I work every day is making marketing of personal financing products. I work more online and do marketing in the public office. What I learned during my work with the federal bank was how to deal with different payload customers. the way management is to ensure the best service to the customer according to the promised time. My workplace culture is very lively. work productively and ensure achievement can be targeted. The difficult part of working alongside is when you want to get information from customers who are out of the area who do not have a good line like in the interior. but can be solved by meeting with customers. what I like during my work is to make a marketing that is a lot of walking and going out to many people.
cons_text: faced with the risk of accidents on the road

review_title: Good environment workplace with dynamic team work.
review_body_text: Job spec, manage customer's loan application and meet customer for sign agreement and open account. Learn in communication with customer and can work under pressure Workplace culture, work in team, dynamic team player, and achieving target The hardest part of the job, is achieving target of Personal Loan for 200k in 3 weeks. The most enjoyable part of job is meet new people, fun workplace and had a good teamwork.

During my previous working, I was needed to deal with the customers and to smoothen out the works for my higher ups. I also was able to intensify my skill in using Microsoft Office especially Word and Excel. I learnt how to work in a team in order to deliver organization's goals.

I work at Bank Rakyat as a Br Smart. Everyday I will go out to do a marketing or promotion of Bank Rakyat products like Personal Financing, Takaful Amani, Wasiat and Credit Card. What i have learned in this job is I learned how to handle customers and any problems that arise along I work at Bank Rakyat and I learned how communicate good with customers.The management of Bank Rakyat is good. I really like the workplace culture, all staff is kind and work together to solve problems. The hardest part I do is to explain something that is not in my job scope to customer that very angry to Bank Rakyat. The most enjoyable part of the job is the time of work is flexible.
cons_text: NO Medical Card provide to Br Smart

review_body_text: Responsibilities to carry out marketing and sales financing products and services of the Bank. Ensure that sales targets set for financing Aslah, wills and other incentive-based product sales.

I got guidance from a very good staff. I learn how to perform compliance assessment/checklist on proposal paper that introduces new or variance product and services prior to launch. I am also learn to prepare periodic monthly reports and ad-hoc compliance reports on the status of product/services being submitted to BNM
i gain a lot of experienced there. they give me opportunity to entertain customer who want apply for personal loan. the hardest part of job is to calculate customer salary.

Participated with documentation process and perform daily work. Assisted customers queries regarding financing. I am also handling and participated for any event held by Bank Rakyat as well as doing an administration work.

- Everyday is challenging because need to find sales. - I learned about Bank Rakyat S'ban services and improved my soft skills. - The management is quite good. - The workplace culture is average. - The hardest part of the job is to find for sales. - The most enjoyable part of the job is I got to meet different types of people.

Since this company in financial field, all workers here are very hardworking person. They always make their job as their priority and served best services to their customers. When dealing with customers, they will make sure that customers will satisfied with their services. If they have any event they will always give their cooperation without being selfish. They also teached me how communicate with customers and handling the customers. I also learn how to settle the problems by my ownself.
I get many of experiences. I learn how to handle a lot of customer at that time. I learn backwork processes in bank. I also known about financing personal and home financing.

A typical day at work when Monday and Friday because many customer at bank. But i can help operation unit for easy their work. I learned how to manage a lots of customer, how to treat customer in everything case. I so interesting when as a customer services at this bank because i get many of experiences.

review_title: Fun workplace with variety sport every week..
review_body_text: 1.process loan customer and then follow up untill customer come to agreement sign. 2. Searching and scanning of market for target customer. 3.the hardest part every month must achieve a target 4.enjoyable job but not fun around with work culture that be because a worker always change time to by time.
pros_text: Free work style d high incentives

review_title: The workplace a fun and people have a good relationship.
review_body_text: I learned many things to be a sales person. Also learn how to do marketing and approach customers to interested with the bank's product. The hardest part is i need to approach customer to attract them with the product if not i did't get any case for that day. The most enjoyable part is our company once a week make a gathering for built up relationship among us.

It is good for your career as long as you have strong mental capacity against your customer and also surrounding. You will get more knowledge if you working at branch rather than HQ because you will be exposed and involved directly with customer.

The management is very nice and hardworking, the training is good also, and the workers a did a good job. I learned a lot with the leadership. The most enjoyable part of the job is to work in a peaceful.
Can work by team..can manage my self if anthing problem.hardwoking..fun with custmer and staf. Work time. The culture very good.can get more knowledge.

fun working place with friendly and amazing staff that willing to guide an internship student like me. it is a very great experience for me as i able to learn a lot of new things that i can apply to my future job.
pros_text: every tuesday is a potluck day. lots of food

review_body_text: Workplace comfortable and organized.Colleagues always provide guidance and friendly. Every day will be held the briefly meeting to tell about what happened yesterday and communicate any important information to all employees

Normal situation when handling customer Patient and negotiation skill Quite unfair on certain aspects Very good culture they have Handling rude customer just via phone Teamwork strive for monthly target
flexible working hours, fun workplace, highly motivated with a supporting team and team leaders, improvised my communication skill and taking care about staff welfare.
I think this is place gives me a reason why i passed an internship with excellent result. I mean working there is so fun, friendly employee, not a depressed job and very healthy working environment.

Daily work connected with various government organizations and the corporate sector to make the scope of work to be challenging in the negotiations and reach a decision. Fun thing is to get acquainted with various backgrounds from various organizations.
location: Menara Bank Rakyat, Jalan Rakyat, KL

review_body_text: Work on Bank rakyat is more fun and great because the top management and all the staff in bank rakyat is the suportive and its always give me the positive vibes for start my work.
Good organization that everyday active market the product. The hardest job was to find the market place and get new customer.

review_title: Fun place but i looking for more experience and its sad my contract end early
review_body_text: Nothing to comment , I learn new thing, able to work on field , able to polish my communication and marketing skills. I love to work here. The location not fully strategic, somehow i try my best to perform.
have to prepare schedule every day regarding money have to use that day....prepare marketing tool and product for my clerk and marketing dept and operation dept...
cons_text: always have to prepare to be tranfer to other place

review_body_text: Good place to work, good benefits to staff, environment was also good, and the most enjoy part of the job is the management give appreciation that satisfied the staff.

Staff at that company such a good members and like family members. My supervisor are good sv and he always give opportunities to me to join their career fair at KLCC. I so excited with that event and that event give me a lot new knowledge.
pros_text: Have a nice pantry a lot of food because hari raya potluck

review_body_text: Hardest to find customer, have a good working mate and profesional branch manager. Fun work place, always be patience when face any problem, especially from your boss
- have a library - have a large pentry - area in work station is comfortable - work in team is good. - relationship staff with team leader good
The location and building itself is one of the best parts of the job, food options are also of many variety for lunch and co-workers and head were very friendly and welcoming.
i can learn how to communicate with customer and how to handle personal loan at bank rakyat. I also can about system bank using.

review_title: Equipped with adequate comfort with basic equipment for carrying out tasks
review_body_text: - Near a surau and washroom. - Tutoring by senior colleagues while on duty. - Colleagues friendly. - A colleague who always give a commitment to work to get the maximum output and efficiency.

i started my work from 8.30a.m until 5.30 p.m. i learned a lot from the management like handling customer, filling up their loan document, key in customer data, and doing marketing. i gained a lot of experience with the environment and other co-workers. they taught me how to calculate the loan and dealing with the customers. the hardest part in this job areas was the skill needed when faces with shrewish customer. but the most enjoyable part of the job is when u have good relation with other worker and the company management. at the end you will have a lot of experience either it is good or bad environment.
must be full time. learn about accounting and audit. management was good to make workplace for fun. must be enjoy to make a work.
It always fun having friendly colleagues. I learned something new everyday and this place has a great working environment.

Friendly co-workers and I have learned how to communicate with the community. Beside that, I have improved my ability to work in a group and learned how to become a flexible person in adapting any situation.
One of the dominant islamic bank and rapidly growing in Malaysia. With a new HQ and new working environment, they are heading towards a positive growth for many more years to come.

From my point of view, this company is quite good. They have give an opportunity to work with them even I'm a fresh graduate and have a minimum in work experience. They have teach me how to choose the prospect of marketing that can be used during I perform my work.The staff also are very friendly. They always helps me in conducting my job. They also help me when I have a some confuse during perform the job.

Best place to work with fun and supportive management. This place give the opportunity to excel and show your talent and works. Workers are helping each other for the company growth. The best part was working among my colleagues and they are very friendly and not reluctant to share the information and willingly to teach those who are needed.

review_title: productive worker must know how to manage his/her stress. He / She can manage time accurately. Always smile and happy.

what i learn in company bank rakyat is learn to good team work,responsible with jobs and must strong in get customer to achieve the many customer for every months.The management is very good and every employees can share their experiences in achieve customers.Its is the most enjoyable part of the job because the jobs is very easy but i must strong to get customer because many competitors with many company and people.
Rotation on different department such as financing unit, documentation unit, operation unit. I learn much on how to deal with customers, learn to communicate each others.

I did the administrative works and assist staff in multiple task to ensure that I can get the clear picture about banking industry. I've learn a lot of things such as the way or techniques to promote the products, how to interact with the customers, how to market the products to the potential customers and also how to work in a group. The management is very good in handling their staff and customers and the co workers there always offer assistance when i need their consultation. Over all this company is very fun and enjoyable workplace surrounded with family-like environment between their staff.
